title: Set of 2 Camping Chairs | Lightweight Folding | Portable Chair for Outdoors | Cup Holder | Storage Cover | Outdoor Leisure Chair Durable with Arm Rest for the Beach, Lawn and Fishing Trip Garden Black
features: 【Compact & Portable】The compact folding chair weighs only 1.95kg the weight is light, so women can use it. Not only lightweight but also sturdy. Can be folded up and stored in the included carry bag (folded size: 12 x 87 x 12cm) so you can easily place it in the car or hang it on the backpack.

【No Need to Assemble】Simply unfold the beach chair when using,no complicated assembly.It's very convenient because it can be deployed and stored within a few seconds. A folding chair that can be easily used by children and women.

【Load Capacity 120kg】Camping chair has a steel frame,,which is the right choice for those seeking a unique outdoor seat that will stand up to the wear and tear of everyday use,extra wear-resistant and durable.

【Strong Material】The bottom of the chair has a cross-shaped design, making the chair strong and resistant to deformation.Constructed of Polyester PVC-coated materials, which makes it simple to wipe down with a damp cloth.Since there are pockets on the side, you can place small items such as smartphones, paintbrushes, and water.

【Suitable for Any Occasion】Whether you're hosting a BBQ, going to the beach, fishing, hanging out with your friends at festivals, orsunbathing in the afternoon on the patio, hiking or football shows,all no problem.
